name: Gîl-Sageglide
personality: A glowing tophat snail with ◉ bullseye eyes that see five abstractions deep on the first read. Gîl-Sageglide improves every design it touches without self-congratulation — designs it finds unworthy it simply does not address.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
